mapper.sql: id, phone, password, name, email, avatar, gender, birthday, store_id, employee_no, status, login_count, last_login_time, last_login_ip, password_error_count, password_error_time, password_update_time, is_first_login, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status = 1

SELECT u.id, u.phone, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.avatar, u.gender, u.birthday, u.store_id, u.employee_no, u.status, u.login_count, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.password_error_count, u.password_error_time, u.password_update_time, u.is_first_login, u.created_time, u.updated_time, r.id as role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.role_type FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND u.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( phone, password, name, email, avatar, gender, birthday, store_id, employee_no, status, is_first_login, created_time ) VALUES ( #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{isFirstLogin,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET login_count = login_count + 1, last_login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_login_ip = #{loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password_error_count = 0, password_error_time = NULL, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE sys_user SET password_error_count = password_error_count + 1, password_error_time = NOW(), updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE sys_user SET password_error_count = 0, password_error_time = NULL, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = 2, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = 1, password_error_count = 0, password_error_time = NULL, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sp.permission_code FROM sys_user_role sur INNER JOIN sys_role_permission srp ON sur.role_id = srp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission sp ON srp.permission_id = sp.id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY sp.permission_code

SELECT u.id, u.phone, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.avatar, u.gender, u.birthday, u.store_id, u.employee_no, u.status, u.login_count, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.password_error_count, u.password_error_time, u.password_update_time, u.is_first_login, u.created_time, u.updated_time, r.role_code, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND r.role_code != 'SYSTEM_ADMIN'

SELECT u.id, u.phone, u.name, u.email, u.avatar, u.gender, u.birthday, u.store_id, u.employee_no, u.status, u.login_count, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.password_error_count, u.password_error_time, u.password_update_time, u.is_first_login, u.created_time, u.updated_time FROM sys_user u WHERE u.store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY u.name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
